name: Atomic Red Team — BAS / AEV runner
description: Runs Atomic Red Team (redcanaryco) atomic tests on the (remote) worker host and reports the per-test outcome to XORCISM's emulation layer (EMULATIONRUN / EMULATIONRESULT), powering the ATT&CK validation-coverage heatmap — the 'validate' stage of CTEM / Adversarial Exposure Validation. Wraps the canonical Invoke-AtomicTest executor. SAFE by default: execute=false only PLANS/checks the technique (lists atomics, optional -CheckPrereqs) without running anything; execute=true actually runs it (authorized BAS only — the runner enforces engagement scope). Offline: pass `file` = a saved result export; no config = a built-in simulated sample.

parameters.name: technique
parameters.help: ATT&CK technique to run, e.g. T1059.001 (uses Invoke-AtomicTest)

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host the atomic runs ON (the worker's own host). REQUIRED to execute — it must be inside the engagement scope (ROE), so execution is authorized + audited. Leave empty for plan/check only.

parameters.name: test_guids
parameters.help: Optional comma-separated atomic GUIDs to limit to specific tests

parameters.name: execute
parameters.help: false = plan/check only (no execution); true = actually run the atomics. Requires `target` in an active engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved atomic-result export to import instead of running
